    • Artificial Intelligence NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost

    Baseten, Cognition, DeepInfra, Together AI, and Cursor are seeing compounding value from NVIDIA’s software and open source ecosystem.

    Learn More

    Simulation NVIDIA Research Keynote at SIGGRAPH 2026

    Join NVIDIA AI research and engineering leaders Neil Ashton, Edward Liu, and Ming-Yu Liu to experience the latest advances shaping computer graphics and simulation.

    Learn More

    Data Center Anthropic Claude Now Powered by NVIDIA GB300 in Microsoft Foundry

    Claude is now generally available on NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems on Microsoft Azure with NVIDIA Quantum-X800 InfiniBand networking.

    Learn More

    Data Center NVIDIA Vera Rubin Delivers World-Class Supercomputers for Science

    NVIDIA Vera Rubin accelerates demanding HPC workloads like climate modeling, computational fluid dynamics, and energy exploration. 

    Learn More

    HPC JUPITER Shows What Exascale Science Looks Like

    Europe’s first exascale supercomputer—running on NVIDIA Grace Hopper™—maps the brain, models climate, and lays the AI groundwork for 6G networks.

    Read Announcement

    AI Day On-Demand

    Robotics NVIDIA Halos for Robotics: A Full-Stack Physical AI Safety System

    This end-to-end safety system for humanoids and industrial robots unifies NVIDIA IGX™ for AI and functional safety, Halos OS, and the Halos AI Systems Inspection Lab to speed certification. 

    Learn More

    NVIDIA GTC Keynote Replay

    See CEO Jensen Huang's keynote on the new era of inference, AI factories, open source, physical AI, robotics, and more. Watch Replay

    Artificial Intelligence

    AI is powering change in every industry. From generative AI and speech recognition to medical imaging and improved supply chain management, AI is providing enterprises that compute power, tools, and algorithms their teams need to do their life's work.

    Overview Data Analytics Machine Learning Predictive Analytics Recommender Systems Speech AI Apache Spark RAPIDS
    Artificial Intelligence | Blog

    How Cosmos 3 Reasons, Generates, and Acts to Advance Physical AI

    New OmniModel for robots, autonomous vehicles, and vision AI agents wins leaderboards.

    Agile Robots, Pegatron and Foxconn.

    Artificial Intelligence | Announcement

    New Collection of Open Source Physical AI Agent Skills and Tools

    Automate complex physical AI workflows with agent skills.
    Artificial Intelligence | Announcement

    The New Frontier Open Foundation Model for Physical AI Is Here

    NVIDIA Cosmos 3 OmniModel— reasoning, simulation, and action generation in one.
    Agentic AI | Announcement

    Enterprise Software Is Going Agentic With NVIDIA

    From engineering to healthcare, companies gain always-on AI coworkers with NVIDIA’s open stack.
    Agentic AI | Blog

    At NVIDIA, Teams Scale Human Ingenuity With OpenAI Codex Agents

    GPT‑5.5 was co-designed for, trained with, and served on NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 systems.
    Agentic AI | Blog

    Make Autonomous Agents More Secure by Design With NVIDIA OpenShell

    Deploy self-evolving agents with added control, security, and governance.
    Artificial Intelligence | Announcement

    New Open Physical AI Data Factory Blueprint

    Accelerate robotics, vision AI agents, and autonomous vehicle development.
    Artificial Intelligence | Blog

    Adobe and NVIDIA Announce Strategic Collaboration

    This collaboration will deliver the next generation of Adobe Firefly models and agentic workflows.
    Corporate | Blog

    AI is a Five-Layer Cake

    AI is one of the most powerful forces shaping the world today. It isn't a clever app or a single model; it's essential infrastructure, like electricity and the internet.
    Agentic AI | Announcement

    NVIDIA Unveils Nemotron 3 Family of Models for Agentic AI

    The open, hybrid models deliver top efficiency and accuracy for complex, high-throughput applications.
    Artificial Intelligence | Announcement

    Bring Physical AI to Cities and Industrial Infrastructure

    Advanced blueprints, vision language models and synthetic data generation extensions from NVIDIA Metropolis enhance productivity and improve safety across environments.
    Artificial Intelligence | Blog

    RTX AI Garage: NVIDIA Levels Up Local AI Agents on RTX PCs and DGX Spark

    NVIDIA OpenShell runtime is coming to Windows, NemoClaw support is expanding, and new agentic AI optimizations and creator app updates are arriving—including NVIDIA Broadcast 2.2, upcoming RTX acceleration for Adobe Premiere and Photoshop, and DLSS Ray Reconstruction for Blender Cycles.
    1. Short Description
    2. How Cosmos 3 Reasons CMPTX26 1
    3. New Collection of Open CMPTX26 2
    4. The New Frontier Open CMPTX26 3
    5. Enterprise Software CMPTX26 4
    6. Transforming Cities GTC 9
    7. Make Autonomous
    8. New Open Physical AI GTC26 2
    9. Adobe and NVIDIA Announce GTC26 6
    10. AI is a Five-Layer Cake
    11. NVIDIA Unveils Nemotron
    12. Bring Physical AI to Cities
    13. Creating SFG CMPTX 6

    Design and Simulation

    NVIDIA accelerated computing, libraries and AI models enable software makers and industry manufacturers to develop products for large-scale, physically accurate simulations and interactive digital twins so teams can efficiently build, train, and test advanced systems before deployment, bringing products to market faster.

    Overview Newsroom Shop Physical AI Industrial AI Computer Aided Engineering Rendering and Visualization Virtual and Augmented Reality
    Agentic AI | Blog

    Industrial Software Leaders Build Autonomous AI Engineers

    Secure, specialized agents compress weeks of simulation work into hours.
    Semiconductor | News

    NVIDIA and TSMC Bring AI Into Fabs to Advance Chipmaking

    TSMC is using NVIDIA accelerated computing and AI to advance semiconductor design and manufacturing. 
    Simulation | News

    Bringing Design, Engineering, and Manufacturing Into the AI Era

    Industrial software giants are bringing NVIDIA CUDA-X™, Omniverse™, and GPU-accelerated industrial software and tools to their customers.
    Simulation | Course

    Customizable OpenUSD Trainings Now Available

    The Learn OpenUSD curriculum is now open source, empowering you to tailor world-class training content for your community.

    Amazon Devices and Services

    Robotics | Blog

    Amazon Devices & Services Achieves Zero-Touch Manufacturing With NVIDIA

    The company’s innovative manufacturing solution powers robotic arms to autonomously audit devices using NVIDIA technologies.
    Simulation | Blog

    NVIDIA Omniverse Digital Twins Help Taiwan Manufacturers Drive Golden Age of Industrial AI

    Blueprints for building autonomous manufacturing facilities offer transformative advances for development of trillion-dollar industries.

    Cadence, ETAP, Schneider Electric, Vertiv

    Simulation | Blog

    NVIDIA Expands Omniverse Blueprint for AI Factory Digital Twins

    NVIDIA’s expanded Omniverse Blueprint for AI factory design and operation features deeper integrations across the AI factory power, cooling, and networking ecosystem
    Simulation | Announcement

    NVIDIA Blackwell RTX PRO Comes to Workstations and Servers

    Groundbreaking AI and graphics performance redefines visualization, simulation, and scientific computing.
    Simulation | Blog

    NVIDIA Unveils Open Physical AI Dataset for Robotics and Autonomous Vehicles

    Collection of simulation-ready ground-truth and synthetically generated data now open source.
    Simulation | Announcement

    The World Foundation Model Platform to Accelerate Physical AI

    The development of physical-AI-embodied systems such as robots and autonomous vehicles is accelerated with the new NVIDIA Cosmos™ platform.

    2. Industrial Software CMPTX26 1

    11. The World Foundation

    High-Performance Computing

    High-performance computing (HPC) is the ability to process data and perform complex calculations at high speeds. HPC is one of the most essential tools fueling the advancement of computational science.

    HPC Overview SC22 Event Supercomputing Healthcare Public Sector Energy NVIDIA HPC SDK NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo
    HPC | Announcement

    NVIDIA Launches Earth-2 Family of Open Models

    The first fully open, production-ready weather AI stack makes weather AI accessible worldwide.

    Danish Centre for AI Innovation

    HPC | Announcement

    NVIDIA and Ansys Advance Quantum Algorithms for Fluid Dynamics

    NVIDIA CUDA-Q running on the Gefion supercomputer enables new engineering applications for quantum computing. 
    HPC | Blog

    NVL72 GB200 Powers the Future for Quantum Computing

    NVIDIA accelerates workloads spanning quantum computing research.
    HPC | Announcement

    NVIDIA to Build Accelerated Quantum Computing Research Center

    The new center will advance the development of quantum computing architectures and algorithms.
    HPC | Announcement

    Earth-2 Announces New NIM Microservices

    Leverage AI-accelerated models to simulate real-world outcomes for climate and weather.
    Simulation | Blog

    Revolutionize AI-Driven Material Discovery Using NVIDIA ALCHEMI

    NVIDIA ALCHEMI introduces the first accelerated materials discovery NIM.
    HPC | Announcement

    NVIDIA Powers Europe’s Fastest Supercomputer

    NVIDIA Grace Hopper platform boosts simulation and training on the Jülich JUPITER supercomputer.
    HPC | Event

    Acceleratings Quantum Computing Centers Worldwide With CUDA-Q

    Supercomputers are incorporating NVIDIA Grace Hopper and CUDA-Q to advance quantum research.
    1. Short Description
    2. NVIDIA Launches Earth-2
    3. NVIDIA and Ansys GTC 1
    4. NVL72 GB200 GTC 2
    5. NVIDIA to Build Accelerated
    6. Earth-2 Announces New NIMs

    8. NVIDIA Powers Europe’s
    9. Acceleratings Quantum Computing Centers Worldwide With CUDA-Q

    Gaming and Creating

    NVIDIA RTX™ powers the world’s fastest PCs and the ultimate platform for gamers and creators. Enjoy beautiful ray tracing, AI-powered DLSS, and much more in games and applications, on your desktop, laptop, in the cloud, or in your living room.

    GeForce Graphics Cards Laptops DLSS Reflex NVIDIA Studio GeForce NOW NVIDIA App Game Ready Drivers G-SYNC
    Artificial Intelligence | News

    Introducing NVIDIA RTX Spark

    The fusion of NVIDIA AI and RTX graphics in a single chip, powering a new beginning of Windows PCs.
    Games | News

    NVIDIA DLSS

    Catch up on the latest DLSS games this month.
    Games | News

    NVIDIA DLSS 4.5

    Powering today's hits, and introducing enhanced Ray Reconstruction.
    Games | Platform

    DLSS 4.5

    DLSS is a revolutionary suite of neural rendering technologies that brings Dynamic 6X MFG and a second gen transformer model.
    Games | News

    RTX Remix

    Advanced Particle VFX coming next month.
    Games | News

    GeForce Rewards

    License to unlock: Your 007 First Light Daring Elite Outfit*.

    *Terms and conditions apply.
    Gaming Hardware | Product

    GeForce RTX 50 Series Graphics Cards and Desktops

    GeForce RTX 50 Series GPUs bring game-changing AI capabilities to gamers and creators. Multiply performance with NVIDIA DLSS 4, generate images at unprecedented speed, and unleash your creativity with NVIDIA Studio.
    Cloud Gaming | Blog

    Joyride Through July With 12 Games Coming to GeForce NOW

    Start the month with ‘Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains’ sweeping in with new games in the cloud this week. 
    Artificial Intelligence | Blog

    RTX AI Garage: NVIDIA Accelerates Google DeepMind's DiffusionGemma for Local AI

    The new DiffusionGemma open model generates text in parallel — not one token at a time — and is optimized to run on the NVIDIA RTX PRO platform, NVIDIA DGX Spark systems and GeForce RTX GPUs.

    Automotive

    From developing autonomous vehicles on NVIDIA DRIVE® to creating factory digital twins and retail experiences with NVIDIA Omniverse, our automotive solutions offer the performance and scalability to design, visualize, simulate, and create all types of future transportation.

    Automotive Industry Self-Driving Vehicles In-Vehicle Computing AI Training AV Simulation Partners DRIVE Videos
    Automotive | Announcement

    The World Is Building Robotaxis on NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion

    Automotive industry leaders are bringing Level 4-ready fleets to market on the DRIVE Hyperion platform.
    Automotive | Announcement

    NVIDIA Unveils Alpamayo 2 Super Open Reasoning Model

    Alpamayo 2 Super is a 32 billion-parameter reasoning VLA model, built for Level 4 robotaxi-ready autonomous vehicles.

    Lucid

    Careers | Announcement

    Leading Automakers Adopt NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion for L4 Vehicles

    BYD, Geely, Hyundai Motor Group, Isuzu, Kodiak, Nissan, and Volkswagen build on the NVIDIA AV platform.
    Automotive | Blog

    Mercedes-Benz Unveils New S-Class Built on NVIDIA DRIVE AV, Designed With L4-Ready Architecture

    Built on the NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion and DRIVE AV, the new S-Class delivers safety first autonomy.
    Automotive | Blog

    NVIDIA Wins Second CVPR Autonomous Grand Challenge

    The competition tests how AI generates safe, realistic self-driving behavior from sensor data.
    Automotive | Blog

    NVIDIA Launches Halos, a Full-Stack, Comprehensive Safety System for AVs

    A full-stack, comprehensive safety system that unifies vehicle architecture, AI models, chips, software, tools, and services to ensure the safe development of AVs, from cloud to car.
    Automotive | Blog

    NVIDIA Expands Automotive Ecosystem to Bring Physical AI to the Streets

    Global automakers, mobility innovators, suppliers, and software providers team with NVIDIA to deliver AI from the cloud to the car.
    Automotive | Announcement

    HMG Embraces NVIDIA AI and Omniverse for Next-Gen Mobility

    Learn how HMG accelerates innovation with NVIDIA – creating safer, smarter vehicles, boosting manufacturing, and advancing robotics.
    Automotive | Announcement

    Three Computer Solution for Autonomous Mobility Enhanced With Cosmos

    Transportation leaders Foretellix, Uber, Waabi and Wayve are among first to adopt the Cosmos platform to accelerate the development of autonomous vehicles.
    Automotive | Announcement

    DRIVE AI Systems Inspection Lab Achieves New Industry Safety Milestones

    Read about NVIDIA’s new safety and cybersecurity initiative for autonomous vehicles partners.

    Robotics and Edge AI

    The NVIDIA Jetson™ and Isaac™ platforms provide end-to-end solutions to develop and deploy AI-powered autonomous machines and edge computing applications across manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, smart cities, and retail.

    Shop Overview Robotics Platform Embedded Edge Robotics Research Isaac Simulation NVIDIA IGX NVIDIA-Certified Systems Ecosystem Partners

    Robotics | Announcement

    JetPack 7.2, NemoClaw make Jetson agentic-ready for robotics, healthcare, industrial automation.

    NVIDIA IGX Thor powers real-time physical AI at the industrial edge, enabling autonomous machines with advanced sensing, reasoning and functional safety..

    Explore how edge AI and accelerated computing are delivering real-time intelligence to autonomous machines and smart infrastructure across industries..

    Celebrate the holidays with the perfect gift for your robot: an NVIDIA Jetson™ AI robotics computer.

    Discover enhanced processing, AI reasoning, safety, and support for industrial, robotics, and medical applications.

    The new NVIDIA® Jetson Thor™ Developer Kit and module are now available.

    See how dexterity workflows and AI models address challenges like adaptability and data scarcity.

    The First Open Foundation Model for Humanoid Robot Development

    NVIDIA Isaac™ GR00T N1 brings generalized skills and reasoning to humanoid robots.

    Join us for a day of specially curated sessions that will unveil breakthroughs in humanoid robotics, foundation models, and physics-based simulation.

    Data Center and Cloud Computing

    From the cloud to the office to the data center to the edge, NVIDIA provides solutions that deliver breakthrough performance on enterprise AI and HPC workloads at any scale, driving business decisions in real time and resulting in faster time to value.

    Data Center Cloud Computing Edge Computing NVIDIA LaunchPad NVIDIA AI Enterprise DGX Systems NVIDIA-Certified Systems

    Coherent

    Manufacturing | Blog

    Coherent and NVIDIA Reindustrialize U.S. With Texas Factory Expansion

    The expanded fab will advance the reindustrialization of America, with U.S. workers scaling first-of-its-kind 6-inch InP photonics to power the nation's next industrial chapter.
    Data Center | Announcement

    NVIDIA Vera BlueField-4 STX: AI Storage Secured in Silicon

    NVIDIA DOCA delivers 1,000x faster threat detection and zero-trust file access for agentic AI.
    Data Center | AI Factory

    Build AI Factories Faster With NVIDIA DSX

    Lower token cost and accelerate deployment with reference designs, digital twins, and software.
    Data Center | Announcement

    NVIDIA and Google Cloud Power AI Breakthroughs

    Extreme codesign across the full‑stack AI platform fuels what’s next for agentic and physical AI.
    Data Center | Announcement

    NVIDIA and Emerald AI Accelerate Power-Flexible AI Deployment

    New AI factories built with NVIDIA Vera Rubin DSX are set to strengthen the U.S. power grid.
    Data Center | Blog

    Introducing NVIDIA RTX PRO™ 4500 Blackwell Server Edition

    This compact GPU delivers power-efficient performance for every enterprise.
    Data Center | Announcement

    NVIDIA Launches New Era of Space Computing

    Data-center-class performance and edge AI on orbit for geospatial intelligence with NVIDIA Vera Rubin Space Module, IGX Thor, and Jetson Orin.
    Data Center | Announcement

    New NVIDIA Vera Rubin DSX AI Factory Reference Design

    The new reference design provides a guide for building codesigned AI infrastructure that delivers maximum token per watt and accelerated time to first production.
    Data Center | Announcement

    NVIDIA Accelerates AI for Naval Postgraduate School

    Learn how NPS utilizes its NVIDIA DGXTM GB300 system to solve challenges in the public sector.
    Data Center | Product

    NVIDIA DGX B300 is Shipping Now

    Explore the new features and capabilities, including AC and DC power options, that make DGX B300 easy to integrate into any data center.

    About NVIDIA

    NVIDIA pioneered accelerated computing to tackle challenges no one else can solve. Our work in AI and digital twins is transforming the world's largest industries and profoundly impacting society.

    NVIDIA GTC Careers Newsroom NVIDIA On-Demand Leaders Corporate Overview
